result.original_query: Which segment had the highest revenue in FY2025?

normalized_facts.sub_query: Which segment had the highest revenue in FY2025?
normalized_facts.resolved_sub_query: Which segment had the highest revenue in FY2025?
normalized_facts.validated_sql:
SELECT segment_name, revenue_usd_millions
FROM financial_performance_by_segment
WHERE fiscal_year = 2025
ORDER BY revenue_usd_millions DESC
LIMIT 1
